transcript.text: Hello, living in Lafayette, V-LOG, the 10th of July, 2013.
It's 6.10, I figure it's time for me to do my V-LOG.
I got up at like 10.30, kind of slept in, I was sleeping really well.
I was up really late last night, maybe like 3, I think, 3.30,
Working on my timeline, but I was also, I watched a movie with Hilary Duff
Called The Art of Finding a Man or something, romantic comedy, it was pretty good.
So, I was listening to the Capital from Karl Barks,
And I'm not absorbing any of it, but I just want to get through it
Just to know what it's basically about.
So today I got up and I just weren't working on the timeline,
Just various different pages, you know, just brain candy stuff.
I watched some Young Turks and I watched, listening to Das Kapital,
And that's basically all I did.
Then my roommate came home from work and he helped me adjust my front brake on my bike,
And he let me borrow his back wheel so I can ride to work,
And then I put that thing on.
I had to, this thing wasn't adjusted right,
So I put a bunch of rubbers in there to make it tight.
I should have put plastic in there because that moves around a little,
But it's not that bad, so cool.
I got a bike ready to ride to work.
I like that because now I don't have to wear a backpack at all,
So I can basically go on my spandex and feel like I'm actually on a normal ride.
And when I'm done with work, I can go on a normal ride
And forget that I even have anything attached to it.
So these things are badass.
You've got to have those.
There's my bag, and it's permanently sewed on to the rack.
So all I do is throw stuff in there and I go.
It's got everything, it holds everything I need, so it's pretty badass.
So that's what I did, and I made some videos.
I've been getting a lot of comments and request videos and keeping up with it,
So it's pretty cool.
I'm not making any money though on YouTube.
I only made $4 yesterday.
Anyways, whatever.
I should make another channel, but I'm not going to get around to that for a long time.
I'm not going to get around to anything.
Oh yeah, somebody wanted me to do an exercise.
I'm so fat.
I was going to do it today, but what happened was last night I got,
I didn't have dinner, and then I went out, I had the munchies
Because somebody gave me some like THC pills, and I took a couple.
They didn't really give me a high, but they gave me the munchies.
So at like 11.30, I went out and I got one of those like 12% alcohol drinks for $2.70,
And then I got a bag of potato chips and some popsicles,
And so I didn't really have a good dinner, and then that thing made me kind of feel bad.
Those things are bad.

I mean, they taste good, but your stomach is like, what the fuck is this?
Yeah, dude, those things are bad.

And then I'll be able to, yeah.

I definitely should.
